title: Snap gets closer to releasing new AI glasses after years-long hiatus
summary: Snap is moving forward with its long-delayed augmented reality glasses through a new partnership with Qualcomm, signaling concrete progress after years of development delay. The multi-year deal promises momentum on the next generation Spectacles.
content: Specs has long been teasing the next version of its augmented reality glasses. A new partnership with Qualcomm promises some movement in that department.

zh.title: Snap在多年停滞后更接近推出新AI眼镜
zh.summary: Snap通过与高通的新合作伙伴关系推进其长期延误的增强现实眼镜开发，标志着在多年开发延迟后取得具体进展。这项多年协议为下一代Spectacles眼镜带来了发展动力。

title: Snap is sticking with Qualcomm for its next AR glasses
summary: Snap's consumer AR glasses are set to launch this year powered by Qualcomm's Snapdragon XR chip under a multi-year strategic partnership. This milestone caps a decade of development for glasses designed to layer digital experiences over the real world.
content:
Snap's upcoming consumer AR glasses are still set to launch sometime this year, and they'll be powered by a Snapdragon XR chip from Qualcomm, according to an announcement of a "multi-year strategic agreement" between the companies.
Snap has been working on smart glasses for a decade, with the first model of its camera-equipped Spectacles glasses launching in 2016. But the past couple generations, which have been AR glasses capable of layering digital experiences over the real world, haven't been available to general consumers. The consumer Specs won't be the first time Qualcomm and Snap have worked together, as Snapdragon chips have powered …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Snap继续与高通合作推出下一代AR眼镜
zh.summary: 在多年战略伙伴关系下，Snap的消费级AR眼镜将于今年推出，搭载高通的Snapdragon XR芯片。这一里程碑标志着十年开发周期的完成，该眼镜旨在将数字体验叠加到现实世界。

title: Dad stuck in support nightmare after teen lied about age on Discord
summary: A data breach reveals Discord had knowledge of a teenager's actual age despite the user misrepresenting it, raising concerns about the platform's age verification safeguards. The incident highlights parent frustration getting support for underage account issues.
content: Data dump confirms dad's suspicions that Discord knew teen's age prior to hack.

zh.title: 青少年在Discord谎报年龄导致父亲陷入支持噩梦
zh.summary: 一起数据泄露事件表明，尽管用户谎报年龄，Discord仍掌握青少年的实际年龄信息，引发对平台年龄验证保障措施的担忧。这一事件凸显了父母在处理未成年人账户问题时获得支持的困难。

title: Gen Z’s love-hate relationship with AI
summary: A new Gallup poll shows Gen Z's AI enthusiasm has sharply declined, with only 18 percent expressing hopefulness despite heavy use in school and work. Young people feel pressured to use AI while growing increasingly skeptical of its actual benefits.
content:
Gen Z is increasingly disillusioned with AI - just not enough to stop using it. 
A new Gallup report released this week, based on responses from nearly 1,600 people ages 14 to 29 across the US, suggests the hype is wearing off for the digital-native generation as AI becomes more embedded in school and work. Enthusiasm is falling and resentment is growing, even as many young people feel they still need to use the technology. 
Gallup's poll, conducted in February and March this year, found Gen Z's feelings on AI have cooled significantly since last year. Only 18 percent said they were hopeful about the technology and 22 percent said they wer …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Gen Z与AI的爱恨关系
zh.summary: 一项新的盖洛普民调显示，Z世代对AI的热情急剧下降，尽管在学校和工作中大量使用，但只有18%的人表示乐观。年轻人感到被迫使用AI，同时对其实际好处越来越怀疑。

title: YouTube Premium is getting pricier
summary: YouTube is raising Premium prices across all tiers, with individual plans jumping to $15.99 (up $2) and family plans to $26.99 (up $4). Price increases are in effect for new subscribers and rolling out to existing customers.
content:
YouTube Premium is getting more expensive in the US, with prices rising by $2 on standard individual accounts and as much as $4 for the family plan. The price hike is already in effect for new accounts, and is rolling out now for existing customers.
Premium's Individual plan now costs $15.99 per month, up from $13.99, while the five-person Family plan is $26.99, previously $22.99. Premium Lite, which removes "most" ads but doesn't include YouTube Music, is now $8.99 monthly, up from $7.99.
The new prices are live now for new signups, and 9to5Google reports that existing subscribers are beginning to be notified about the price hike via the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube Premium价格上涨
zh.summary: YouTube正在提高所有等级的Premium价格，个人计划上升至$15.99（上升$2），家庭计划上升至$26.99（上升$4）。价格上涨对新用户立即生效，并逐步推出给现有客户。

title: Rocket Report: Chinese version of Falcon 9 fails; Artemis depends on rapid heavy lift
summary: A Chinese competitor to SpaceX's Falcon 9 rocket failed during launch as space exploration becomes increasingly geopolitically competitive. NASA's Artemis program underscores the strategic importance of reliable heavy-lift launch access.
content: “As space becomes increasingly strategic, access is no longer a luxury."

zh.title: 火箭报告：中国版猎鹰9号失败；阿耳忒弥斯取决于快速重型运载能力
zh.summary: 随着太空探索变得越来越具有地缘政治竞争性，SpaceX猎鹰9号的中国竞争对手在发射时失败。NASA的阿耳忒弥斯计划强调了可靠重型运载发射能力的战略重要性。

title: Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps
summary: Microsoft is removing redundant Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps including Notepad and Snipping Tool, consolidating AI access into subtler 'writing tools' menus. The underlying AI features remain embedded within apps.
content:
Microsoft is starting to remove "unnecessary" Copilot buttons from its Windows 11 apps. In the latest version of the Notepad app for Windows Insiders, Microsoft has removed the Copilot button in favor of a "writing tools" menu. The Copilot button in the Snipping Tool app also no longer appears when you select an area to capture.
The change is part of "reducing unnecessary Copilot entry points, starting with apps like Snipping Tool, Photos, Widgets and Notepad," that Microsoft promised to complete as part of its broader plan to fix Windows 11. While Copilot buttons are being removed, it looks like the underlying AI features are here to stay, …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软开始从Windows 11应用中移除Copilot按钮
zh.summary: 微软正在从记事本和截图工具等Windows 11应用中移除冗余的Copilot按钮,将AI功能整合到更隐蔽的"写作工具"菜单中。底层AI功能仍然内嵌在应用中。

title: Orion helium leak no threat to Artemis II reentry, but will require redesign
summary: The Artemis II mission experienced helium leaks similar to previous flights, but this won't affect reentry safety. NASA will need to redesign the valves for future Artemis missions to prevent recurring issues.
content: After leaks on Artemis I and II, Orion's next flight to the Moon will need new valves.

zh.title: 猎户座氦气泄漏对阿尔忒弥斯II号再入无威胁，但需要重新设计
zh.summary: 阿尔忒弥斯II号任务经历了与之前飞行类似的氦气泄漏，但这不会影响再入安全。NASA需要为未来的阿尔忒弥斯任务重新设计阀门，以防止反复出现的问题。
